streak.title: Your streak
streak.freeze_hint: Freeze go save your streak if you miss one day. You go earn one every 7 days — you fit keep 2.
streak.at_risk: No lose your {{days}}-day streak o — one lesson today go keep di flame dey burn!
streak.today_done: You don show today. Come back tomorrow make di flame still dey burn.
streak.start: Finish one lesson today make your flame start to burn.
streak.keep_going: You dey move well — show tomorrow make e grow.

badges.title: Your awards
badges.subtitle: Small wins dey add up — gather all of dem.

growth_leap.name: Growth Leap
growth_leap.desc: Beat your pre-quiz score by 25+ points

comeback.name: Comeback
comeback.desc: You miss one day, use freeze, still dey go

next_session.title: When you go study next? Set am now.
next_session.hint: One tap — your reminders go follow am.
next_session.saved: E don set! We go remind you {{when}}.

growth.pre_post: You move from {{pre}}% go {{post}}% — na real growth be dat!
growth.grew: You don grow +{{delta}}% since your last try!
growth.baseline: You score {{score}}% — na your starting point be dat. Anything wey follow na growth.
growth.steady: Your best still be {{best}}% — every practice dey make am strong.

reminder_digest.title: Time to do small review
reminder_digest.body: Your practice don ready — small minutes go lock am for your head.

coach_digest.title: Your weekly coaching check-in
coach_digest.body: Fresh look at your week — and one focus for next week.

dropoff_alert.title: Some learners fit dey fall behind
dropoff_alert.body: Some learners for your cohort dey at risk — check on dem.

certificate_issued.title: Certificate ready 🎓
certificate_issued.body: You don finish {{title}} — check or download your certificate.

project_graded.title: Dem don grade your project
project_graded.body: {{title}} don dey reviewed. Tap to see your result.

assessment_invalidated.title: Dem cancel one attempt
assessment_invalidated.body: Integrity check cancel one attempt — you fit need to retake am.

final_failed.title: You never pass
final_failed.body: You no pass {{title}} this time. Check your retakes make you try again.

payout_failed.title: Payout wahala
payout_failed.body: We get issue to pay {{entityTitle}}. Our team dey on am.

earn_back_processed.title: Earn-Back dey come 🎉
earn_back_processed.body: {{amount}} dey go back to your payment method.

earn_back_no_payout.title: Course complete
earn_back_no_payout.body: No Earn-Back remain for {{entityTitle}} — but your certificate ready.

earn_back_failed.title: Earn-Back dey process
earn_back_failed.body: We dey process your Earn-Back for {{entityTitle}} — our team go reach you.

payout_failed_admin.title: Payout fail (action need)
payout_failed_admin.body: Instructor payout fail: {{reason}}. Abeg check am and open support ticket.

earn_back_failed_admin.title: Earn-Back refund fail (action need)
earn_back_failed_admin.body: Earn-Back refund fail: {{reason}}. Abeg check am and open support ticket.

instructor_application.title: New instructor application
instructor_application.body: {{name}} wan teach. Dem no fit publish anything until you approve dem.

instructor_approved.title: You don get approval to teach 🎉
instructor_approved.body: Your Creator Studio don open — start to build your first course.

instructor_rejected.title: About your instructor application
instructor_rejected.body: We no fit approve am dis time. You still welcome well well as learner.

cohort_kickoff.title: {{cohortTitle}} don start
cohort_kickoff.body: Your cohort don dey go — open am make you meet your group.

deadline_soon.title: E go soon due
deadline_soon.body: {{count}} thing(s) go due for di next few days, starting with {{first}}.

facilitator_assigned.title: You dey facilitate one cohort
facilitator_assigned.body: Dem don assign you as facilitator for {{cohortTitle}}.

course_published.title: New course don land
course_published.body: Dem don publish {{title}} for di catalogue.

coach.focus: Wetin to focus on dis week

pacing.ahead: You dey ahead of your weekly goal — {{done}}/{{target}} lessons dis week. Correct pace!
pacing.on_track: Steady pace — keep di rhythm dey go.
pacing.behind: You dey small behind your weekly goal — one more lesson go put you back on track.
pacing.rushing: You dey move fast! Small recap of wetin you learn go make am stick.
